demographics.diagnosis: Autism Spectrum Disorder, Level 2 (requiring substantial support), Intellectual Disability (Mild)

currentSkills.communication: Speaks in 3-5 word sentences, can express basic needs, difficulty with abstract concepts
currentSkills.social: Interacts with familiar adults, limited peer interaction, prefers adult company
currentSkills.adaptive: Needs prompting for hygiene (showering, teeth brushing), cannot prepare meals independently, not toilet trained at night
currentSkills.academic: Reading at 2nd grade level, basic math skills (addition/subtraction)
currentSkills.behavior: Generally compliant, occasional refusal behaviors when asked to do non-preferred tasks

priorityAreas: Community safety skills (crossing streets, stranger danger)

familyContext.primaryLanguage: Spanish at home, English at school (bilingual)
familyContext.parentAvailability: Parents work full-time, grandmother provides after-school care
familyContext.familyGoals: Preparing him for supported living and employment
